header.name: Nathan Cheng
subtitle: Film-trained designer-engineer with cross-disciplinary range who ships from front-end to infrastructure.

entries.title: Design & Systems
entries.summary: Wide-ranging part-time role at a family-run B2B software company (users: 3M, EPA, Lilly); expanded sales and support work with design, video, and engineering.
bullets: **Architected a relational Next.js + Supabase system to replace a legacy Access customer database of 40k+ records; outside vendors had quoted $25–60k for the project.** Designed data model unifying customer & operational logic over 30 years of mixed conventions, speeding lookups & unblocking automation, with new APIs keeping legacy systems live.
**Replatformed customer support docs from WordPress to Mintlify** with a custom Firecrawl + Python pipeline, making the content easy to edit with AI and discoverable for AEO.
**Streamlined marketing website from 700+ to ~200 core pages,** leading information architecture and visual refinement.

**Designed a component-system concept for the flagship workflow builder,** unifying 40+ serial-device configuration options into a single progressive-disclosure flow modeled on native Windows patterns.
**Reduced recurring setup questions ~30%** with a walkthrough video series that replaced 90s-era documentation.

entries.title: Designer and Developer
bullets: **Designed pitch decks for 3 pre-seed startups (Techstars),** sharpening positioning and competitive differentiation.
**Built a React/Next.js config generator for an LLM interview chatbot,** cutting setup errors for screening flows.

entries.title: Portfolio site
bullets: **Designed and built a personal portfolio site** with filtered views by medium and category, shareable via URL state.

**Built motion details across the site:** scroll-driven card stacking with iOS notification physics, shader-driven hero, layout-animated selection indicators, timing and layering specced frame-by-frame from annotated reference videos.
**Consolidated content + media to MDX in repo + Cloudflare R2** (was Sanity CMS + Cloudinary): simplified stack so content edits ship with code, agents can read and edit directly.

entries.title: AI context infrastructure
bullets: **Released public agent tooling for knowledge work:** 30+ Vercel-registry skills (~1K weekly installs) plus `web-clipper-headless` for server-side Obsidian clipping by agents, webhooks, and cron.
**Structured a 5,400+ note Obsidian vault for agent access:** typed metadata, live Bases dashboards, hybrid semantic search, and recent-context injection at session start.
**Published `obsidian-remote-mcp`,** an OAuth 2.1 server for remote AI access to a headless Obsidian vault, with concurrency-safe section edits across multiple agents.
**Built and operate a Synology-based personal server stack** running the vault, a persistent Claude Code agent, and self-built MCP servers accessed via Tailscale and Cloudflare Zero Trust SSO.

sections.label: Skills
bullets: **Engineering:** Javascript/TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind, Astro, Bun, Supabase, Framer Motion, Cloudflare (Workers, R2, Zero Trust), Vercel, Docker, AI agent architecture (skills, context engineering, memory, MCP servers), Claude Code, Cursor

**UX, Design, Content:** Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Final Cut, Affinity, UI, Design systems, Visual design, Branding, Typography, Information architecture, Prototyping, CSS animation, Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard handling)

entries.title: Venture for America Fellowship (now Ember Fellowship)
bullets: **Selected for national entrepreneurship fellowship (10% acceptance);** workshops with McKinsey, IDEO, Frog Design. Led 5-person team to Judge Pick + Crowd Favorite in 3-day sprint, designing and pitching a city exploration app.

entries.title: Web development foundations (The Odin Project) + Animations on the Web (Emil Kowalski)
Wesleyan University - B.A. in Film Studies, Minor in Integrated Design and Engineering
bullets: **3.71 GPA;** Honors, Dean's List; Frank Capra Prize for excellence in cinematic filmmaking, humor, and pathos
**Led team to first place in Bethesda-founder-led game-dev intensive:** shipped iOS demo, designed level structure and UI, pitched to AFI / Warner Bros. Games / Demiurge industry jury.
